member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureConstraintsHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the ConfigureConstraintsHelper for sending a ConfigureConstraints
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the ConfigureConstraints
to.
member.remarks: One shot to give state of constraints on character and response to constraints.
